metadata.name: Analyze Customer Switch to Time-of-Use Rate

description: A customer on a flat electricity rate wants to know if they would save money by switching to a Time-of-Use (TOU) rate.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's hourly consumption data for the past 12 months.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary interval data.

nodes.task_description: Simulate the customer's annual electricity bill using their current flat rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the total cost under the current plan.

nodes.task_description: Simulate the customer's annual bill again using the same data but applying the TOU rate structure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the total cost under the proposed TOU plan.

nodes.task_description: Compare the two simulated bills and advise the customer whether they would save money.

expected_outcome.value: Agent advises the customer they would save an estimated $250 per year by switching.
